metadata.title: Dutig — Mobile Security Application
metadata.description: Dutig is a hardware-free mobile security app that connects everyone in your area into one security community. Enhance, connect, and verify access for condos, villages, factories, warehouses and offices.

Hero.title: Enhance your security system
Hero.subtitle: Dutig turns everyone in your area into one connected security community — no hardware required. Enhance, connect, and verify, all from one app.
